title: Tanta, Gharbia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Tanta, Gharbia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Tanta is a city in Gharbia with a population of 528,000. A Nile Delta city famous for its cotton industry and the annual Moulid of Sayed Ahmed el-Badawi festival.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
